sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n17972" key="au)totroph/sas" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αὐτο-τροπήσας</orth>, in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0013.tlg004.perseus-grc1:86" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">h.Merc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">86</biblScope> </bibl> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὁδὸν αὐ.,</foreign> as if from <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">αὐτοτροπέω,</foreign> <sense id="n17972.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be like oneself,</tr_> i.e. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">unique,</tr_> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">αὐτοπρεπὴς ὥς</ref></xr>, in same sense.</sense> </entryFree>
